contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Wholesale page MOQ split + warm-up draft cites /wholesale/
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/80
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/76
  
  Details:
  Differentiated wholesale MOQ by path on the website and wired the new /wholesale/ page into the AI warm-up draft generator as a visual companion to the PDF.
  
  What changed:
  
  agroverse_shop (PR #80):
  - Split /wholesale/ pricing into two side-by-side cards: Consignment (opening order 5 bags, supplier owns inventory until sold, retailer pays as bags sell through) and Wholesale bought-outright (opening order 10 bags, retailer owns at order). Same $17/bag, $25–$35 recommended retail, shipping included on both.
  - Origins (Oscar's Bahia, Fazenda Santa Ana, Paulo's La do Sitio, Vivi's Jesus Do Deus) extracted into a single shared callout — applies to either path.
  - Mobile: cards stack via media query.
  - Meta description, og:description, twitter:description updated to reflect both paths.
  
  go_to_market / market_research (PR #76):
  - suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py warmup_body_template: one new sentence pointing the reader to https://agroverse.shop/wholesale for "partner-shop shelf photos and current U.S. stockist list," explicitly framed as "the visual companion to the PDF."
  - grok_warmup_system_prompt: matching rule with guardrails — single short mention, complementary not redundant, link is NOT the primary CTA, primary CTA stays "reply by email with consignment vs bulk." Prevents Grok from anchoring drafts on the link and undercutting the email-reply funnel.
  - templates/warmup_outreach_reference.md style guide: same convention added to the Dos list.
  
  Why:
  - Davi-class prospects (small wellness/metaphysical shops, the conversion bottleneck) get a 5-bag consignment door instead of a 10-bag commitment.
  - Wholesale-bought at 10 bags self-selects more committed retailers who'd rather own inventory.
  - Mirrors the "consignment vs bulk parallel options" framing the warm-up email already uses.
  - The /wholesale/ page carries shelf-proof and stockist visuals the PDF can't carry; warm-up emails now cite both without making them feel duplicative.
  
  Pull requests:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/80
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/76
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
